Example objects from salmonMSE

Source: R/data_obj.R
simple_SOM.Rd

S4 objects containing operating model inputs to run the projection.

Usage

simple_SOM

multi_SOM

Format

An object of class SOM.

An object of class SOM of length 1.

Source

See salmonMSE website

Examples

data(simple_SOM)

data(multi_SOM)
